name: Steak Au Poivre
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely crush all peppercorns in a pestle and mortar.
2. Sprinkle crushed pepper over both sides of steaks, pressing in well with the palm of your hand. Let stand 30 minutes.
3. Melt 1 tablespoon of butter in a skillet and heat until foaming. Add steaks and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side (adjust cooking time to achieve desired doneness).
4. Turn steaks and top each one with remaining butter. Sprinkle with a few drops of hot-pepper sauce and Worcestershire sauce.
5. Pour brandy over steaks and heat through for a few seconds using a flame, then remove from heat.
6. Add whipping cream to the skillet and stir well. Heat through for 1 minute, scraping up any sediment from the bottom of the skillet.
7. Season with salt and spoon the mixture over steaks. Serve immediately.
8. NOTE: Serve with fried potatoes and a green salad. Garnish with a fresh Italian parsley sprig, if desired.
